description: This file defines an Express router handling AI persona generation endpoints, including schema validation, mapping v2 persona data to legacy format, and integrating with personaService for persona draft creation.

methods.name: getSchemas
methods.description: Asynchronously loads and caches Zod schemas for persona generation requests and drafts.

methods.name: validationError
methods.description: Sends a 400 response with validation error details.

methods.name: mapV2PersonaToLegacyPersona
methods.description: Converts a v2 persona object into a legacy flat schema for compatibility, extracting name, role, skills, and experience.
